response.justification: Bogdan has over 6 years of full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools like AWS CDK and Docker, directly aligning with the role’s stack and responsibilities; he also brings rare AI-agent infrastructure experience and strong architectural judgment across diverse systems, though his German language skills are limited and some technologies (e.g., Nest.js, Vitest) are implied rather than explicitly stated.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React)
Proven AI-agent and agentic workflow development experience
Strong architecture and DevOps skills with Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD
concerns: Nest.js and Vitest not explicitly mentioned in resume
German language proficiency is only basic, may hinder collaboration
Some roles show fragmented focus across too many languages and domains
